blocks.headline: Welcome back
blocks.sub: Your project home base. Catch up on the latest updates, grab your deliverables, review invoices, and send us a note — all in one calm, private place.

items.d: Every milestone, decision, and next step — posted here as we go so you always know exactly where your project stands.
Logos, source files, drafts, and final deliverables, organized and ready to download whenever you need them.
View and pay invoices, see what's outstanding, and download receipts for your records — no chasing emails.

blocks.html:
Recent updates

The latest from your Northstar team.

Loading updates…

Leave a message

Have a question or a change request? Drop us a note and we'll get back to you.
blocks.css: .cp-wrap{padding:64px 20px;display:flex;justify-content:center}.cp-inner{width:100%;max-width:760px}.cp-inner h2{margin:0 0 6px;font-size:1.7rem}.cp-lede{margin:0 0 28px;opacity:.7}.cp-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px;margin:0 0 48px}.cp-item{padding:20px 22px;border-radius:14px;background:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.07);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.04)}.cp-item h4{margin:0 0 6px;font-size:1.1rem}.cp-item p{margin:0;opacity:.78;line-height:1.55;font-size:.95rem}.cp-empty{margin:0 0 4px;opacity:.6;font-size:.9rem}.cp-loading{opacity:.6}.cp-msgbox{padding:32px;border-radius:18px;background:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.07);box-shadow:0 6px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.05)}.cp-msgbox h3{margin:0 0 6px;font-size:1.3rem}.cp-msgbox>p{margin:0 0 22px;opacity:.72;font-size:.95rem}.cp-msgbox form{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px}.cp-msgbox label{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;font-weight:600;font-size:.9rem}.cp-msgbox input,.cp-msgbox textarea{padding:12px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.16);border-radius:10px;font-size:1rem;font-weight:400;font-family:inherit;background:#fafafa;resize:vertical}.cp-msgbox button{margin-top:4px;padding:14px 22px;border:0;border-radius:10px;font-size:1rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;background:#1f2937;color:#fff}.cp-msgbox button:disabled{opacity:.6;cursor:default}.cp-msg{margin:16px 0 0;min-height:1.2em;font-weight:600}.cp-msg.ok{color:#15803d}.cp-msg.err{color:#b91c1c}
blocks.js:
(function(){function esc(s){return String(s==null?'':s).replace(/[&<>"]/g,function(c){return{'&':'&','<':'<','>':'>','"':'"'}[c];});}var list=document.getElementById('cp-list');function item(u){return '

'+esc(u.title||'Update')+'

'+esc(u.body||'')+'

';}var samples=[{title:'Homepage redesign — first drafts ready',body:'We\u2019ve uploaded three homepage directions to your Files. Take a look and let us know which feels most like you.'},{title:'Kickoff recap & timeline',body:'Thanks for a great kickoff! The full project timeline and milestone dates are now posted. First review is set for next Thursday.'},{title:'Brand assets delivered',body:'Your logo pack, color palette, and type system are finalized and available to download. Source files included.'}];function render(items){if(!list)return;if(!items||!items.length){list.innerHTML='

No updates yet — here\u2019s a preview of what they\u2019ll look like.

'+samples.map(item).join('');return;}list.innerHTML=items.map(item).join('');}if(list){fetch('/api/data/updates').then(function(r){if(!r.ok)throw new Error('bad status');return r.json();}).then(function(d){var items=Array.isArray(d)?d:(d&&d.records)?d.records:(d&&d.data)?d.data:[];render(items);}).catch(function(){render([]);});}var f=document.getElementById('cp-form');if(!f)return;var nameEl=document.getElementById('cp-name');var bodyEl=document.getElementById('cp-body');var btn=document.getElementById('cp-submit');var msg=document.getElementById('cp-msg');f.addEventListener('submit',function(e){e.preventDefault();var name=(nameEl.value||'').trim();var body=(bodyEl.value||'').trim();msg.className='cp-msg';if(!name||!body){msg.textContent='Please add your name and a message.';msg.className='cp-msg err';return;}btn.disabled=true;var orig=btn.textContent;btn.textContent='Sending…';fetch('/api/data/messages',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({name:name,body:body})}).then(function(r){if(!r.ok)throw new Error('bad status');return r.json();}).then(function(){f.reset();msg.textContent='Thanks! Your message is in — we\u2019ll reply by email soon.';msg.className='cp-msg ok';btn.textContent=orig;btn.disabled=false;}).catch(function(){msg.textContent='Something went wrong. Please try again.';msg.className='cp-msg err';btn.textContent=orig;btn.disabled=false;});});})();
